title: Register Transfer Operations Flowchart
description: A flowchart depicting the control flow and data movement for a basic register transfer operation within a CPU, highlighting the roles of the control unit, registers, and the data path.
relationships: CU decodes instruction and generates control signals
Control signals enable the output of Register A onto the Bus
Control signals enable the input of Register B to load data from the Bus
Clock pulse synchronizes the transfer, ensuring data is stable
